description: Search for venues in Edinburgh and retrieve a list with basic information
success_criterion: List of at least 3 venues with names, locations, and contact details

description: Gather detailed information (price, capacity, amenities) for each venue from the list
success_criterion: Detailed data collected for all venues in the list

description: Draft a professional flyer using the collected venue details
success_criterion: Flyer draft includes venue name, location, price, key features, and contact information
